dod.preamble: Land the 0011 closure state. No engine code.

items.text: The 0011 state/objective closure flips (028 accepted; status closed) are committed.
Suite green; no engine code touched.
Self-review + handback written; branch pushed and PR raised (merge is the operator's).

handback: Housekeeping done: committed 0011's closure flips (iteration 028 accepted; workstream status closed in state.json + objective.json) plus this workstream's own loop state. No engine code; suite green. PR raised for the operator to merge; after merge this workstream can be closed.
self_review: Holds: a pure state-landing change, gated through a real working iteration per the repo rule; the DoD's git-diff check proves the 0011 flips are committed. Weak: this workstream's own final accept/close flip will itself be uncommitted after merge - an inherent one-step lag in recording loop state; acceptable, noted rather than chased recursively.
